meta.name: Customer Case Study Miner
meta.description: Identify power users and high-health accounts from your customer data, draft case study outreach emails, and track approval pipeline.

parameters.content:
## 40 — Customer Case Study Miner

**Required:**
- ACCOUNTS_SHEET_ID: columns company, segment, mrr, health_score, tenure_months, nps_score, notable_use_case, contact_email
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Runs:** Monthly on the 1st at 12:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Write a short, genuine outreach email asking a happy customer to participate in a case study. Be direct and personal. No fluff.

value.title: Approve Case Study Outreach: {{ $json.total_candidates }} candidates
value.summary: Review {{ $json.total_candidates }} drafted outreach emails before sending.

parameters.subject: 📖 Case Study Candidates {{ $('Build Candidate List').first().json.date }}: {{ $('Build Candidate List').first().json.total_candidates }} drafted
